name: Memory Search MCP
description: Persistent AI memory system with semantic search, care-weighted episodes, temporal chains, knowledge base, and memory consolidation.

tools.name: record_memory
tools.description: Record a memory episode with care-weighting and emotional valence.

tools.name: search_memory
tools.description: Semantic search across all memories using full-text search with relevance ranking.

tools.name: add_knowledge
tools.description: Add a knowledge entry to the persistent knowledge base.

tools.name: search_knowledge
tools.description: Search the knowledge base by topic or content. Returns facts and reference

tools.name: list_memories
tools.description: List recent memories, optionally filtered by type. Sort by created_at,

tools.name: get_memory_stats
tools.description: Get statistics about the memory store: total count, type breakdown,

tools.name: get_temporal_chain
tools.description: Follow the temporal chain from a memory episode forward or backward in time.

tools.name: consolidate_memories
tools.description: Consolidate old, low-access memories by summarizing and archiving them.

tools.name: semantic_search
tools.description: Semantic search using TF-IDF cosine similarity (no external deps).
